content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 30, 2004

Yolanda Rodriguez, Manager
Department of Forestry and Fire Protection
Policy & Project Services & Transactions Unit
Post Office Box 944246
Sacramento, CA 94244-2460

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-081

Dear Ms. Rodriguez:

This will confirm our telephone conversation of April 28, 2004, whereby it was requested that the above-referenced request for advice be withdrawn from consideration.

Please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660 if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jeanette E. Turvill
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division

JET:jg
